testcase.name: adversarial_9.2_buffer_overflow

failure.message: Analysis pipeline failed: Error in compaction: Error reading from metadata segment reader: error occurred while decoding column 0: mismatched types; Rust type `u64` (as SQL type `INTEGER`) is not compatible with SQL type `BLOB`

testcase.failure: Analysis pipeline failed: Error in compaction: Error reading from metadata segment reader: error occurred while decoding column 0: mismatched types; Rust type `u64` (as SQL type `INTEGER`) is not compatible with SQL type `BLOB`

testcase.name: adversarial_9.3_encoding_attacks

failure.message: Analysis pipeline failed: Error in compaction: Error reading from metadata segment reader: error occurred while decoding column 0: mismatched types; Rust type `u64` (as SQL type `INTEGER`) is not compatible with SQL type `BLOB`
